title: Pinball: The Man Who Saved the Game
original_title: Pinball: The Man Who Saved the Game
overview: The dramatic comedy is based on the true story of writer and pinball wizard Roger Sharpe, chronicling his journey to overturn New York City’s 35-year ban on pinball.
